results.rendered_html:
abhiśap 1 U. To curse, execrate; abhiśaptaḥ phalametadanvabhūt  Ku. 4. 41. 
— Caus. To conjure, invoke (as by charms), charm, enchant; satyena mābhirakṣa tvaṃ varuṇetyabhiśāpya kaṃ  Y. 2. 108.
